name: cloudflare-gateway-pihole-scripts
description: Automated Cloudflare Gateway list management with Pi-hole compatible blocklists

scripts.start: npm run download && npm run cloudflare:create
scripts.dev: npm run download && cross-env DRY_RUN=1 npm run cloudflare:create:list
scripts.dry: npm run download && cross-env DRY_RUN=1 npm run cloudflare:create:list
scripts.sync: npm run download && npm run cloudflare:create
scripts.sync:blocklist: npm run download:blocklist && npm run cloudflare:create
scripts.cloudflare:refresh: npm run download && npm run cloudflare:create
scripts.cloudflare:refresh:blocklist: npm run download:blocklist && npm run cloudflare:create
scripts.cloudflare:create: npm run cloudflare:create:list && npm run cloudflare:create:rule
scripts.cloudflare:delete: npm run cloudflare:delete:rule && npm run cloudflare:delete:list
